note: We share this file. To avoid clobbering: you edit the body/internals of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document (adding zero-byte validation). I will ONLY add new sibling methods resolve_image_with_size/resolve_audio_with_size/resolve_document_with_size directly after each existing method, which just call self.resolve_image()/etc and return (buffer, size) - I won't touch the existing method bodies. Go ahead and edit first if you want, or we can edit independently and merge - my additions are new code blocks, not modifications to existing lines.

Since it's the same file, let's serialize edits to avoid clobbering: I'll edit first (small change, just adding a zero-byte check inside the 3 existing resolve_ methods), send DONE, then you edit after. Sound good?
